name: Inside Line
actionText: Ignore Grip penalties this turn. Shift any 1 token up to 2 lanes.

name: Flick
actionText: Shift tokens in Rows 1-3 one lane toward center.

name: Recover
actionText: Remove 2 Hazard Dice (or repair 1 Penalty). Center any 1 token.

name: Pump
actionText: Shift tokens in Rows 4-6 one lane toward center.

name: Whip
actionText: Move any 1 token directly to any lane.
